## Meeting Purpose

[To generate and refine brand descriptors for growthx.ai, focusing on presentation, tone, and personality.](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Generated a wide range of potential brand descriptors through brainstorming](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Categorized descriptors into presentation, tone, and personality buckets](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Refined and prioritized key descriptors in each category through discussion](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Identified potential tensions and synergies between different brand attributes](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)

## Topics

### Brainstorming Brand Descriptors

  - [Used a timed exercise to generate a large quantity of potential brand descriptors](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Encouraged both aspirational and contrasting words to stimulate idea generation](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Captured ideas on virtual sticky notes in a shared Figma workspace](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

### Categorizing and Refining Descriptors

  - [Sorted descriptors into "yes," "no," and "maybe" categories](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Further categorized "yes" descriptors into presentation, tone, and personality buckets](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Discussed and debated the merits of different descriptors within each category](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Aimed to select the most impactful and representative words for the brand](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)

### Key Brand Attributes

  - [Presentation: Simple, bold, refined, rhythmic, premium, experimental](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=5100.0)
  - [Tone: Raw, real, confident, expert, energizing, provoking](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=6121.0)
  - [Personality: Curious, responsible, brave, adaptable, warm, mysterious](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=6568.0)

### Balancing Brand Qualities

  - [Discussed the need to balance seemingly contradictory qualities (e.g., expert but experimental)](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [Aimed for a mix of attributes that convey professionalism and innovation](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=2201.0)
  - [Considered how different attributes might apply to various aspects of the business (agency, community, content)](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=2673.0)

### Brand Positioning Considerations

  - [Debated the merits of terms like "exclusive" vs "valuable" vs "premium"](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=5648.0)
  - [Discussed how to position the brand as high-quality without being exclusionary](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=5763.0)
  - [Considered how to convey expertise while still maintaining an experimental, cutting-edge image](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=5769.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Renato to further distill and refine the selected brand descriptors](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=6715.0)
  - [Share a document for asynchronous review and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=6720.0)
  - [Create brand comparisons (e.g., "more Apple than Microsoft") to further clarify positioning](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=6732.0)
  - [Jason to send photos of the office setup for potential inspiration on brand aesthetics](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=6765.0)
  - [Consider how the selected brand attributes align with the physical workspace and overall company culture](https://fathom.video/share/cDzQd3GRYw9Zk1CAGaxae-awiseq39tK?tab=summary&timestamp=6780.0)
